---
title: "De la récupération des données de PDF au calcul de l'inflation - Partie Shiny"
categories: ['R', 'Shiny', 'Inflation']
author:
  name: GOLLENTZ Quentin
#  url: https://www.linkedin.com/in/quentin-gollentz-697993172/
  email: quentin.gollentz@outlook.com
date: last-modified
date-format: "DD-MM-YYYY"
description: "Récupération de données issus de PDF"
title-block-banner: "#ECF4FA"
filters:
  - shinylive
shinylive:
  files:
    - data/articles.csv

---

## Création d'un dashboard de réprésentation de l'inflation 

```{shinylive-r}
#| standalone: true
#| viewerHeight: 600

library(bslib)
library(shiny)
library(readr)
library(utils)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)
library(jsonlite)
library(maps)
library(ggplot2)
if (FALSE) {
  library(munsell)
}

articles <- read.csv("articles.csv")

# Conversion de la date
articles$date <- as.Date(substr(articles$code_ticket, 1, 8), format = "%Y%m%d")

ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Évolution du prix des articles"),
  
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      selectInput(
        "article",
        "Choisir un article :",
        choices = sort(unique(articles$nom))
      )
    ),
    
    mainPanel(
      plotOutput("plot_prix")
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  data_filtre <- reactive({
    articles %>% filter(nom == input$article)
  })
  
  output$plot_prix <- renderPlot({
    ggplot(data_filtre(), aes(x = date, y = prix_unitaire)) +
      geom_line(color = "blue") +
      geom_point(size = 3) +
      labs(
        title = paste("Prix unitaire de :", input$article),
        x = "Date",
        y = "Prix (€)"
      ) +
      theme_minimal()
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```
